Insight: Data Truth Fragmentation: Running two tools creates conflicting revenue numbers.
Fix: Unify data sources into a single Source of Truth to save SaaS fees.

Insight: The Vampire Audit: Dead pixels slow the site and leak data to old vendors.
Fix: Remove legacy tags to improve site speed by 20% and close gaps.

Insight: Lead Pipeline Integrity: Custom forms break attribution; ad ROI is invisible.
Fix: Migrate to Native Forms to restore 100% lead-to-ad visibility.

Insight: Performance Tax: Loading two tag managers is a 400ms delay on every click.
Fix: Consolidate into one Server-Side GTM container.

Insight: Privacy Liability: You might be recording passwords on the login page.
Fix: Audit masking settings to ensure zero financial data is recorded.

Insight: Security Posture: Old versions expose the brand to defacement attacks.
Fix: Patch CMS or move to Headless for bank-grade security.

Insight: Compliance Crutch: Widgets don't stop lawsuits if core code is broken.
Fix: Implement native accessibility to remove legal risk.

Insight: Competitor Visibility Index: You are invisible compared to active competitors.
Fix: Launch a retargeting layer to defend market share.

Insight: Revenue Latency: 3s confirmations cause 15% lead abandonment.
Fix: Optimize endpoints to get confirmations under 500ms.

Insight: Organic Market Share: Google is guessing your content due to missing tags.
Fix: Programmatic SEO fixes to reclaim Top 3 search rankings.

Insight: User Frustration Score: Layout shifts cause mis-clicks and ad penalties.
Fix: Fix layout shifts to lower CPC and improve UX.

Insight: Internal Tech Conflict: Paying for tools that IT has already blocked.
Fix: Align Marketing tags with IT Security Policy (CSP).

Insight: Mobile Conversion Barrier: Login buttons are too small for thumbs.
Brand Disconnect: Broken social links hurt enterprise credibility.
Fix: Audit and fix all social touchpoints.

Insight: Inbox Placement Risk: Your domain can be spoofed; emails hitting spam.
Fix: Implement DMARC Reject policy to protect brand.
